text.title: e2e-testing Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure from enumerated journeys to a green smoke gate, with a decision-gate at each transition.

step.name: enumerate-journeys
step.input: Product spec, Linear ticket, or BA acceptance criteria.
step.action: Extract list of user journeys, one per critical revenue/auth path. Drop anything already covered by unit or integration tests.
step.output: journeys.md with N items, N ≤ 15 for a starter suite.
step.decision-gate: If N > 15, split into @critical (top 15) and @nightly (rest). If N == 0, stop — no E2E suite needed.

step.name: propose-testids
step.input: journeys.md + the live UI or design mockups.
step.action: For every interactive element on the journey path, propose a stable `data-testid` in scope-name-type format.
step.output: testids.md mapping (route, element) -> data-testid string. PR to frontend adding the attributes.
step.decision-gate: If frontend cannot add data-testid (legacy code), fall back to getByRole + getByLabel. If neither works, skip the methodology for that journey.

step.name: write-page-objects
step.action: For each route, create e2e/pages/<Name>Page.ts using templates/page-object.ts. Methods named after user intent (login, addToCart), not DOM events.
step.output: One TypeScript file per route under e2e/pages/, each exporting one class.
step.decision-gate: Run `tsc --noEmit` on the pages directory; if errors, fix before proceeding. POMs must be type-safe.

step.name: write-specs-and-fixtures
step.action: Create e2e/fixtures.ts extending base test with testUser + authenticatedPage fixtures. For each journey, write e2e/<journey>.spec.ts tagged @smoke or @critical.
step.output: One spec.ts per journey + e2e/fixtures.ts. Specs import `test` from ./fixtures.
step.decision-gate: Run `npx playwright test --list`; verify count <= 50 in the @smoke/@critical bucket. If over, defer some to @nightly.

step.name: wire-smoke-gate
step.action: Copy templates/smoke-gate.sh into the project's deploy script. CI runs `BASE_URL=$STAGING_URL bash smoke-gate.sh` post-deploy; exit non-zero rolls back.
step.output: Updated deploy.sh + smoke-gate.sh in repo root.
step.decision-gate: If staging URL is not reachable from CI runners, use a self-hosted runner or skip the gate (deploy without rollback).

step.name: run-and-triage
step.action: Run `npx playwright test --reporter=list,html`. For each failure, open trace.zip; classify as real-bug / selector-drift / timing / data / infra. Auto-retry only on infra.
step.output: Test report (HTML), per-failure classification, fix PRs.
step.decision-gate: If flake rate >5% after 3 CI runs, freeze the suite and run flake triage before adding new specs.
